/.title: Shelfiecat
h2: Are you ready to create your virtual bookshelf? Join our wait list!
h3: Shelfiecat is the cozy little nook of the internet where book lovers unite. Build your dream bookshelf with a plethora of delightful reads and share it with your friends!
p: Yousef loves sci-fi books, with the occasional philosophical dilemma. He wants to live a minimalistic life but he also enjoys a big library.
Veronica is a fantasy nerd with a soft spot for Japanese literature. She buys too many books and treats her bookshelf as her zen garden.
